hadiths.ar:
3664   -  وَّ رَّوَّى عَّلِى  ُّ ن ْن ُّ ي َّق ْطِي ن ٍ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ لِى  إ َّن ُّو إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ مُّوسَّى ن ْن ُّ ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّم ك َّ وَّ ي َّعَّالَّى  
مَّغَّ إَّلس ُّلْطَّان ِ إ َّوْلِي َّاءَّ ي َّذْق َّغُّ ن ِهِمْ عَّن ْ إ َّوْلِي َّان ِهِ
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Abu al -Maghra, who said: A man asked Abu Abdullah {a.s}, 
while I was present, 'May Allah {SWT} rectify your affairs. I pass by the official or go to the 
official, and he grants me dirhams. Should I take them?'  
Imam {a.s} said: ‘Yes.'  
I asked: ‘Can I perform Hajj with them?'  
Imam {a.s} said: ‘Yes, and perform Hajj with them.'  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.175 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.6 p.338 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, 
Vol.17 p.213 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3663

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٦٣

hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Ali ibn Yaqtin who said:  
Abu al -Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al -Kadhim {a.s} said to me: 'Indeed, Allah {SWT}, 
Blessed and Exalted, has allies among the rulers through whom He {SWT} repels harm 
from His {SWT} friends.'  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.112 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 3 p.176 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 17 p.169 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.192 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.193 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3664
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٦٤

hadiths.ar: 3666 - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم جَّوَّإن ِح ِ إَّلْأ ِج ْوَّإن ِ
hadiths.en:
And in another narration: "They are the freed ones of Allah {SWT} from the Fire." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.176 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3665

hadiths.ar: 3667   -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ عُّن َّي ْذِ ن ْن ِ ر ُّرَّإرَّة َّ إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّالَّ : ن َّعَّث َّ إ َّن ُّو عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ رَّج ُّلاً إ ِلَّى ر ِي َّاذِ  ن ْن ِ عُّن َّي ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ ق َّق َّالَّ
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said:  
"The expiation for working for the ruler is fulfilling the needs of the brothers."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.176 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.378 • Mishkat 
Al-Anwar, Vol.1 p.101 • Mishkat Al-Anwar, Vol.1 p.316 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.314 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.169 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.192 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.22 p.403 • Awalim Al-Uloom, Vol.20 p.791 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
«

hadiths.ar:
3668  -  رَّوَّى جَّزِي ز   عَّن ْ مُّحَّم َّذِ ن ْن ِ مُّسْلِمٍ ق َّالَّ : سَّا َّلْي ُّهُّ عَّن ْ رَّج ُّلٍ لأِن ْن ِهِ مَّال  ق َّاجْي َّاح َّ إ ِلَّي ْهِ إَّلْأ َّب ُّ ق َّال   إ َّم َّا  
إَّلْأ ُّم ُّ ق َّلاَّ ي َّا ْج ُّذ ْ مِن ْهُّ إ ِلأ َّ ق َّزْص اً عَّلَّى ن َّق ْسِهَّا
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Ubayd ibn Zurarah that he said:  
Abu Abdillah {a.s} sent a man to Ziyad ibn Ubaydillah and said: “Appoint this person to 
some of your work." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.176 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3667

hadiths.ar:
3669  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْحُّسَّي ْن ُّ ن ْن ُّ إ َّن ِى  إَّلْعَّلاَّءِ ق َّالَّ : ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ مَّا ي َّحِل ُّ لِلز َّج لِ مِن ْ مَّالِ وُّلْذِةِ ق َّالَّ  
«إ ِذ َّإ إُّص ْطُّز َّ إ ِلَّي ْهِ   لِأ َّن ِي ك 
ق َّق َّال  هَّذ َّإ إ َّن ِى  وَّ ق َّذْ ط َّلَّمَّن ِى  مِي زَّإي ِى  مِن ْ 
إ ُّمِّى  ق َّا َّج ْن َّزَّةُّ إَّلْأ َّب ُّ إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّذْ إ َّن ْق َّق َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ عَّلَّى ن َّق ْسِهِ ق َّق َّال   ي َّكُّن ْ عِن ْذَّ إَّلز َّج ُّلِ س َّى ْء  إ َّ ق َّكَّان َّ 
رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ  وَّ إ لِهِ ي َّحْن ِسُّ إ َّن اً لأِن ْن ٍ
hadiths.en:
Hariz narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim who said:  
I asked him about a man whose son has wealth, and the father is in need of it.  
Imam {a.s} said: “He may take from it, but as for the mother, she should not take from it 
except as a loan upon herself." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.176 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3668

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٦٨

hadiths.ar:
3670  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْحَّسَّن ُّ ن ْن ُّ مَّحْن ُّوب ٍ عَّن ْ عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ِ سِن َّان ٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال لْمَّزْإ َّة ِ مَّغَّ 
ر َّوْج ِهَّا إ َّمْز  ق ِى  عِي ْق ٍ وَّ لأَّ صَّذَّق َّه ٍ وَّ لأَّ ي َّذْن ِي زٍ وَّ لأَّ هِن َّه ٍ وَّ لأَّ ن َّذ ْرٍ ق ِى  مَّالِهَّا إ ِلأ َّ ن ِا ِذ ْ ن ِ ر َّوْج ِهَّا إ ِلأ َّ ق ِى  ر َّكَّاة ٍ إ َّوْ ن ِزِّ وَّإلِذَّي ْهَّا  
إ َّوْ صِلَّه ِ ق َّزَّإن َّي ِهَّا
hadiths.en:
Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Ala narrated that he said:  
I said to Abu Abdillah {a.s}, "What is permissible for a man to take from the wealth of his 
child?" Imam {a.s} said: “His sustenance without extravagance if he is in need."  
He said: “I then asked him about the saying of the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace be 
upon him and his family), 'You and your wealth belong to your father.'"  
Imam {a.s} replied: “Indeed, the father brought his case to the Messenger of Allah {SWT} 
(peace be upon him and his family) and said: ‘O Messenger of Allah {SWT}, this is my son, 
and he has wronged me concerning my inheritance from his mother.'  
The father then informed him that he had spent it on him and on himself. So, the 
Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said: ‘You and your wealth belong to your 
father.' 
The man had nothing left with him, so w ould the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace be 
upon him and his family) imprison a father for the sake of his son?'" 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.136 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.177 • Ma’ani Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.155 
• Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.6 p.344 • Al-Istibsar, Vol.3 p.49 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.323 • Tafsir Al-Safi, Vol.3 p.448 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.265 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.74 • Tafsir Nur Al-Thaqalayn, Vol.3 p.626 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3669
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٦٩

hadiths.ar:
3671   -  و-  ق ِي لَّ لِلص َّاذِق ِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ ِن  َّ إَّلن  َّاسَّ ي َّزْوُّون َّ عَّن ْ رَّسُّولِ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ إ َّن  َّ هُّ ق َّال 
لأَّ ي َّحِل ُّ لِع َّن ِى ٍّ وَّ لأَّ لِذ ِى  مِز َّة ٍ سَّوِى
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdillah 
{a.s}, who said: "A woman has no authority with her husband regarding emancipation, 
charity, endowment, gift, or vow concerning her wealth, except with her husband's 
permission - except in the case of Zakat, kindness to her parents, or maintaining ties 
with her relatives." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.177 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.438 • Tahdhib 
Al-Ahkam, Vol.7 p.462 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.8 p.257 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.214 • Al-Wafi, Vol.10 
p.537 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.19 p.214 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.23 p.80 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.23 p.315 • 
Al-Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.2 p.414 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3670
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٠

hadiths.ar: 3672 - وَّ رَّوَّى إ َّن ُّو إَّلْن َّح ْي َّزِى ِّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال ح َّزٍ صَّذَّق َّه   هَّن ِي ن َّه
hadiths.en:
It was said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s}:  
"People narrate from the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace be upon him and his family) 
that he said: ‘Charity is not permissible for a wealthy person nor for one who is strong 
and able-bodied.'" 
Imam {a.s} replied: “He {saws} indeed said it is not permissible for a wealthy person, but 
he {saws} did not say for one who is strong and able-bodied." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.177 • Al -Wafi, Vol.10 p.174 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.9 
p.232 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3671
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧١

hadiths.ar:
3673  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلن  َّن ِى  ُّ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ لِزَّج ُّلٍ لَّ لأَّ ق َّالَّ  
«ق َّالَّ لأَّ ق َّال صَّذَّق َّه
hadiths.en:
Abu Al-Bakhtari narrated from Abu Abdillah {a.s} who said:  
"Helping a deaf person to hear without annoyance is a pleasant charity."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.178 • Thawab Al-A’mal wa Iqab Al-A’mal, Vol.1 p.139 • 
Mishkat Al-Anwar, Vol.1 p.220 • Al-Wafi, Vol.10 p.400 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.12 p.134 • Bihar Al -Anwar, 
Vol.71 p.388 • Awalim Al-Uloom, Vol.20 p.715 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3672

hadiths.ar:
3674  -  وَّ إ َّي َّى رَّج ُّل  إ َّمِي زَّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّق َّالَّ ي َّا إ َّمِي زَّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ وَّ إَّلل َّهِ إ ِن ِّى  لَّأ ُّجِن ك َّ ق َّق َّالَّ لَّه 
إ ُّن ْع ِص ُّك
hadiths.en:
The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said to a man:  
"Did you wake up fasting?"  
He replied: “No." 
He {saws} said: “Then did you visit a sick person?"  
He replied: “No." 
He {saws} said: “Then did you follow a funeral procession?"  
He replied: “No." 
He {saws} said: “Then did you feed a poor person?"  
He replied: “No." 
He {saws} said: “Then return to your family and be with them, for that is a charity from 
you to them." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.178 • Thawab Al-A’mal wa Iqab Al-A’mal, Vol.1 p.139 • 
Al-Wafi, Vol.10 p.399 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.9 p.385 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.289 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3673
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٣

hadiths.ar: 3675 - وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلِى    عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم إَّلْق ِي َّامَّه ِ
hadiths.en:
A man came to the Commander of the Faithful {a.s} and said:  
“O Commander of the Faithful, by Allah {SWT}, I love you." 
Imam {a.s} said to him: "But I dislike you." 
The man asked: “Why?" 
Imam {a.s} replied: “Because you seek profit through the call to prayer (Adhan) and take 
payment for teaching the Quran." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.178 • Al-Wafi, Vol.7 p.592 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.5 p.447 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3674

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٤

hadiths.ar:
3676  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْحَّكَّمُّ ن ْن ُّ مِسْكِي ن ٍ عَّن ْ ق ُّي َّي ْن َّه َّ ن ْن ِ إَّلْأ َّعْس َّى ق َّالَّ : ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلا مُّ إ ِن ِّى  إ َّق ْزَّإ ُّ إَّلْق ُّزْإ ن َّ 
ق َّي ُّهْذَّى إ ِلَّى  َّ إَّلْهَّذِي  َّه ُّ  ق َّا َّق ْن َّلُّهَّا ق َّال لْث ُّ لأَّ 
ق َّال
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said:  
"Whoever takes payment for teaching the Quran, his share will be [taken] on the Day 
of Judgment." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.178 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.156 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3675

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٥

hadiths.ar:
3677  -  ورُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ عِي سَّى ن ْن ِ س َّق َّق ِى ٍّ : وَّ كَّان َّ سَّاجِزإً ي َّا ْي ِي هِ إَّلن  َّاسُّ وَّ ي َّا ْج ُّذ ُّ عَّلَّى ذ َّلِك َّ إَّلْأ َّج ْزَّ ق َّالَّ ق َّحَّح َّح ْث ُّ  ق َّلَّق ِي ث ُّ  
إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ن ِمِن ًى ق َّق ُّلْث ُّ لَّهُّ ج ُّعِلْث ُّ ق ِذَّإك َّ إ َّن َّا رَّج ُّل  كَّان َّث ْ صِن َّاعَّي ِى َّ إَّلسِّ حْزَّ وَّ كُّن ْث ُّ إ ج ُّذ ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلْأ َّج ْزَّ وَّ 
ق َّذْ جَّح َّح ْث ُّ وَّ مَّن  َّ إَّلل َّهُّ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ عَّلَّى  َّ ن ِلِق َّان ِك َّ وَّ ق َّذْ ي ُّن ْث ُّ إ ِلَّى إَّلل َّهِ ق َّهَّلْ لِى  ق ِى  س َّى ْءٍ مِن ْهُّ  مَّح ْزَّح   ق َّق َّال 
لأَّ ي َّعْق ِذْ
hadiths.en:
Al-Hakam ibn Miskin narrated from Qutaybah ibn Al -A’sha who said:  
I said to Abu Abdillah {a.s}, "I recite the Quran, and gifts are given to me - should I accept 
them?" 
Imam {a.s} said: “No." 
I said: “What if I did not stipulate it (as a condition)?" 
Imam {a.s} said: “Tell me, if you had not recited it, would they have given you a gift?"  
I said: “No." 
Imam {a.s} said: “Then do not accept it." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.179 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.6 p.365 • Al-Istibsar, Vol.3 
p.66 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.239 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.17 p.155 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3676
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٦

hadiths.ar: 3678  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ي ِمَّارِهَّا وَّ لأَّ ي َّحْمِلْ مَّعَّهُّ مِن ْهَّا س َّي ْن اً
hadiths.en:
It is narrated from Isa ibn Shaqafi, who was a sorcerer to whom people would 
come, and he used to take payment for it.  
He said: I performed Hajj and met Abu Abdillah {a.s} in Mina.  
I said to Him {a.s}: "May I be your ransom! I am a man whose profession was sorcery, 
and I used to take payment for it. I have performed Hajj, and Allah {SWT}, the Mighty and 
Exalted, has blessed me with meeting you, and I have repented to Allah {SWT}. Is there 
any way out for me regarding it?" 
Imam {a.s} said: “Yes, undo (the spells) and do not tie (them)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.180 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.76 p.210 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3677
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٧

hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said:  
"Whoever passes by orchards, there is no harm in eating from their fruits, but he 
should not carry anything from them with him." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.180 • Al-Wafi, Vol.18 p.1077 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.18 
p.228

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 58, H. 3678
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LIVELIHOODS, EARNINGS, PROFITS,
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٨، ح ٣٦٧٨

hadiths.ar: 3680  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلس َّكُّون ِى  ُّ عَّن ْ ج َّعْق َّزِ ن ْن ِ مُّحَّم َّذٍ عَّن ْ إ ن َّان ِهِ عَّلَّي ْهِمُّ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال ق َّالَّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdur -Rahman ibn Al -Hajjaj, from Abu 
Abdillah {a.s}, who said: "Seek refuge with Allah {SWT} from the burden of debt, the 
dominance of men, and the ruin of the unmarried."  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.92 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.181 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.6 p.183 
• Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.140 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.315 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
« :

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 59, H. 3679
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON DEBT AND LOAN
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٩، ح ٣٦٧٩

hadiths.en:
Al-Sakuni narrated from Imam Jafar Al -Sadiq {a.s} from his father, Imam 
Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, who said that the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace be 
upon him and his family) said: "Beware of debt, for it is a disgrace to religion."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.181 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.315 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 59, H. 3680
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON DEBT AND LOAN
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٩، ح ٣٦٨٠

hadiths.ar: 3682  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلِى    ع مَّهَّم َّه   ن ِالل َّي ْلِ وَّ ق َّص َّاء  ق ِى  إَّلذ ُّن ْي َّا وَّ ق َّص َّاء  ق ِى  إَّلْأ ج ِزَّة ِ
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said: "Beware of debt, for it is worry at night and 
humiliation during the day." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.182 • Ilal Al-Shara’i’, Vol.2 p.527 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.144 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.316 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.141 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 59, H. 3681
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON DEBT AND LOAN
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٥٩، ح ٣٦٨١

hadiths.ar:
3683  -  وَّ رُّوِى َّ عَّن ْ مُّعَّاوِي َّه َّ ن ْن ِ وَّهْث ٍ ق َّالَّ : ق ُّلْث ُّ لِأ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ ِن  َّهُّ ذ ُّكِزَّ لَّن َّا إ َّن   رَّج ُّلاً مِن َّ إَّلْأ َّن ْصَّارِ مَّاب َّ  
وَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ ذِي ن َّارَّإن ِ ذَّي ْن اً ق َّلَّمْ  ي ُّصَّلِّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلن  َّن ِى  ُّ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ وَّ ق َّال 
ن َّعْض ُّ ق َّزَّإن َّاي ِهِ   صَّل َّى  إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ إ ِن  َّمَّا ق َّعَّلَّ  
ذ َّلِك َّ لِي َّي  َّعِط ُّوإ وَّ لِي َّزُّذ َّ ن َّعْص ُّهُّمْ عَّلَّى ن َّعْض ٍ وَّ لِن َّلا َّ ي َّسْي َّح ِق  ُّوإ ن ِالذ َّي ْن ِ وَّ ق َّذْ مَّاب َّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ  صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ وَّ 
عَّلَّي ْهِ ذَّي ْن   وَّ ق ُّي ِلَّ إ َّمِي زُّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ   عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ وَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ ذَّي ْن   وَّ مَّاب َّ إَّلْحَّسَّن ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ وَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ ذَّي ْن   وَّ ق ُّي ِلَّ إَّلْحُّسَّي ْن ُّ 
عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ وَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ ذَّي ْن
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said:  
"Beware of debt, for it is humiliation during the day, worry at night, accountability in 
this world, and accountability in the Hereafter." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.95 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.182 • Ilal Al-Shara’i’, Vol.2 p.527 • 
Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.6 p.183 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.141 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.316 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, 
Vol.18 p.327 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.141 
﴿HADITH ﴾
